name: UPSTATE SPURS | Rob Kirkpatrick | Substack
description: Tottenham Hotspur "fanalytics" newsletter from an English Ph.D. and soccer club president in one of the original Thirteen Colonies. Previous writing on Spurs for the Fighting Cock and Huffington Post. Click to read UPSTATE SPURS, by Rob Kirkpatrick, a Substack publication. Launched 10 months ago.
